recommendations.name: Think-aloud testing
recommendations.description: Users verbalize thoughts while interacting with the system
recommendations.rationale: Useful for early usability evaluation with limited participants

recommendations.name: Surveys & Questionnaires
recommendations.description: Collect structured user feedback through questionnaires
recommendations.rationale: Helpful for measuring perceived usability and satisfaction

recommendations.name: Heuristic evaluation
recommendations.description: Experts inspect the interface against established usability principles
recommendations.rationale: Useful for identifying guidance and feedback issues early

recommendations.name: Surveys & Questionnaires
recommendations.description: Collect structured user feedback through questionnaires
recommendations.rationale: Can complement expert-based findings with user perceptions

recommendations.name: USEQ-Like
recommendations.description: A short questionnaire targeting usability experience
recommendations.rationale: Suitable when using questionnaires for usability evaluation

recommendations.name: SUS
recommendations.rationale: Widely used instrument for perceived usability

recommendations.name: Observation Grid
recommendations.description: Structured note-taking sheet for observed usability issues
recommendations.rationale: Useful for capturing qualitative insights during think-aloud sessions
